description.en: This attribute specifies whether the SVG document can be magnified and panned.Value type:disable | magnify;Default value: magnify;Animatable:no

excerpt.es: This attribute specifies whether the SVG document can be magnified and panned.Value type:disable | magnify;Default value: magnify;Animatable:no
